nodes.label: AI as style emulator with clear examples
nodes.label_negative: AI defaulting to its own generic tone
nodes.grounding_span: It's much easier for me to set the style and tone myself ... and then asking the AI to match to that style

nodes.label: AI as collaborative incremental partner
nodes.grounding_span: I would always collaborate ... incrementally working back and forth WITH AI on something and checking at each stage

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and reliability
nodes.label_negative: AI hallucination and going off the rails
nodes.grounding_span: they are often hallucinating or going 'off the rails'

nodes.label: Human experience for high-level design
nodes.grounding_span: you need to have been a human being, with experience in talking to human agents on the phone, to be able to replicate that kind of user experience

nodes.label: Workplace permission to use AI
nodes.grounding_span: to be given the greenlight on this has stopped me from worrying if it was what I should be doing

nodes.label: AI productivity sweet spot vs obsolescence
nodes.grounding_span: there will be a 'sweet spot' ... But soon after that point, there will also be no need for *me* to be doing my job anymore

nodes.label: Creative control and quality
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy that work and also I feel like you need to have been a human being

nodes.label: Intrinsic enjoyment and personal fulfillment
nodes.grounding_span: rediscover the pleasure in certain things in my spare time

nodes.label: Frustration with AI overpromising
nodes.grounding_span: ChatGPT kept insisting that it had solved the issue, but each time i tried it, the issue persisted

nodes.label: Satisfaction with workplace AI encouragement
nodes.grounding_span: to be given the greenlight on this has stopped me from worrying

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI's future impact on job
nodes.grounding_span: there will be a 'sweet spot' ... But soon after that point, there will also be no need for *me* to be doing my job anymore

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative checking — incremental back-and-forth verification
nodes.grounding_span: incrementally working back and forth WITH AI on something and checking at each stage

nodes.label: Example-driven style setting — providing own examples to guide AI
nodes.grounding_span: write one or two examples of my own first, and then ask the AI to replicate that tone and style
